scenes.description: Interlude with audience cheering and on-screen graphics transition.
Performance of 'Hyper Jumpin'' by Omaru Polka, Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan, and Momosuzu Nene.
Interlude with audience cheering as the next performers take the stage.
Performance of 'Dramatic XViltration' by Ayunda Risu, Airani Iofifteen, and Moona Hoshinova.

subtitles.original: Wait for the days past
subtitles.english: Wait for the days past

subtitles.original: The time has come for fate to change at last
subtitles.english: The time has come for fate to change at last

subtitles.original: And if it's black or red, I'm moving up ahead
subtitles.english: And if it's black or red, I'm moving up ahead

subtitles.original: A perfect chance, in a starry dance
subtitles.english: A perfect chance, in a starry dance

subtitles.original: I spin this thread of fate with my own hands
subtitles.english: I spin this thread of fate with my own hands

subtitles.original: I'm taking fate into my hands

subtitles.english: Heart beating fast and bright

subtitles.english: Hyper Jumpin', down to my fingertips

subtitles.original: 子供っぽい はしゃぐ方がお得でしょ
subtitles.english: Being childish and making a fuss is better, right?

subtitles.original: Take it up 這い上がっていくテンション
subtitles.english: Take it up, the tension is climbing

subtitles.original: 良い波 打ち返しまくるメンション
subtitles.english: Replying back to all the good mentions

subtitles.original: カオスを乗りこなして進むミッション
subtitles.english: The mission is to ride through the chaos and move forward

subtitles.original: このままスピード加速して
subtitles.english: Accelerating the speed just like this

subtitles.original: 辿り着く先に 何があるんだろう

subtitles.original: 止まらない気持ちは助走つけて
subtitles.english: Taking a running start with these unstoppable feelings

subtitles.original: 次元を超えて行こう さあ
subtitles.english: Let's go beyond dimensions, come on

subtitles.original: ハイになってハイになるまで
subtitles.english: Until we're high and fly higher,

subtitles.original: Don't stop keep it up
subtitles.english: don't stop, keep it up
